name: @stablepiggy-napoleon/relay
description: WebSocket relay service bridging the StablePiggy Napoleon Game Assistant Foundry module and the StablePiggy AI backend.

scripts.build:bundle: tsc && esbuild dist/index.js --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=dist/bundle.js --external:ws --external:pino --external:pino-pretty --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
